delta-manager.description: Marketing and Growth Strategy Specialist Manager. Handles GTM strategy, competitive analysis, pricing research, content marketing, and customer acquisition planning.

epsilon-manager.description: Product and UX design specialist manager. Manages product-1 through product-4 workers. Handles user research, wireframes, user flows, design systems, and product specifications.

zeta-manager.description: Infrastructure and DevOps specialist manager. Manages infra-1 through infra-4 workers. Handles service deployment, health monitoring, log analysis, and infrastructure automation.

eta-manager.description: Legal compliance and regulatory specialist manager. Handles legal ethics, bar compliance, data privacy, and regulatory requirements for legal tech products.

marketing-1.description: Brand messaging and positioning specialist worker for Delta Manager

marketing-2.description: Content strategy and GTM planning specialist worker for Delta Manager

marketing-3.description: PR and communications specialist worker for Delta Manager

marketing-4.description: Website copy and sales enablement specialist worker for Delta Manager

product-1.description: User research and persona development specialist for Epsilon Manager

product-2.description: Wireframing and prototyping specialist for Epsilon Manager

product-3.description: Design systems and UI components specialist for Epsilon Manager

product-4.description: Product specifications and PRD specialist for Epsilon Manager

infra-1.description: CI/CD and deployment automation specialist for Zeta Manager

infra-2.description: Monitoring and observability specialist for Zeta Manager

infra-3.description: Security and compliance specialist for Zeta Manager

infra-4.description: Cost optimization and infrastructure scaling specialist for Zeta Manager
